recentGames.name: Call of Duty® Modern Warfare® II

trophies.name: Sniper Elite
trophies.description: Obtain all Trophies.

trophies.name: Dam Buster
trophies.description: Sabotage the Dam and destroy the AA guns.

trophies.name: Welcome to the Resistance
trophies.description: Find the Mole and uncover the Superweapon plot.

trophies.name: Trainwreck
trophies.description: Raid the Hotel Terminus and sabotage the Sonderzüge.

trophies.name: Bomb Squad
trophies.description: Ensure Allied secrets remain unknown and confirm the location of Site D.

trophies.name: Industrial Action
trophies.description: Destroy the underground chemical weapons plant and cease Kleine Blume production.

trophies.name: Blast from the Past
trophies.description: Infiltrate Fort Rouge and escape before Allied bombers level the site.

trophies.name: Grapes of Wrath
trophies.description: Infiltrate the V1 rocket launch site and destroy the Zugwerfer.

trophies.name: Whatever it Takes
trophies.description: Stop the Zugwerfers from leaving and obliterating the D-Day landings.

trophies.name: Climbing the Ranks
trophies.description: Reach rank 40.

trophies.name: Vive La Résistance
trophies.description: Complete the campaign.

trophies.name: Crème de la Crème
trophies.description: Complete the entire campaign on Authentic difficulty.

trophies.name: Full English
trophies.description: Complete 11 Optional objectives.

trophies.name: Hostile Takeover
trophies.description: Win one Axis Invasion as an Invader.

trophies.name: Hold the Line
trophies.description: Defeat an invading Sniper Jager.

trophies.name: Brothers in Arms
trophies.description: Play one team-based PVP match.

trophies.name: Just a Scratch
trophies.description: Complete any mission, excluding Mission 1 and Mission 9, on any difficulty without healing.

trophies.name: Open Surgery
trophies.description: Hit every Organ at least once with a Rifle.

trophies.name: Tactician
trophies.description: Make a Tank shoot and destroy another enemy Vehicle.

trophies.name: Pistol Perfectionist
trophies.description: Obtain Six Pistol-related Mastery Medals.

trophies.name: Secondary Supremacy
trophies.description: Obtain Eight Secondary-related Mastery Medals.

trophies.name: Revered with Rifles
trophies.description: Obtain Seven Rifle-related Mastery Medals.

trophies.name: Master-at-arms
trophies.description: Become the Master of each Weapon.

trophies.name: Gunslinger
trophies.description: Kill 150 enemies with a Pistol.

trophies.name: Skirmisher
trophies.description: Kill 300 enemies with a Secondary Weapon.

trophies.name: Sharpshooter
trophies.description: Kill 350 enemies with a Rifle.

trophies.name: Going The Distance
trophies.description: Total kill distance of 100,000 meters.

trophies.name: Blaze of Gory
trophies.description: Kill 50 enemies with Traps.

trophies.name: Eyes on the Prize
trophies.description: Kill 150 enemies with any weapon while in Iron Sights.

trophies.name: Scoping Mechanism
trophies.description: Kill 150 enemies with a Rifle while in Iron Sights.

trophies.name: Set to Blow
trophies.description: Kill 20 soldiers using Booby traps.

trophies.name: The Big Guns
trophies.description: Kill 50 soldiers with Heavy weapons.

trophies.name: Three Birds One Stone
trophies.description: Kill 3 on-foot soldiers with one Grenade.

trophies.name: Jack of All Trades
trophies.description: Get a kill with 20 different Weapons.

trophies.name: Das Nuts!
trophies.description: Get a testicle shot with a Rifle from a distance of 100 meters or more.

trophies.name: Finders Keepers
trophies.description: Kill 50 enemy soldiers with Found Weapons.

trophies.name: Le Fantome
trophies.description: Achieve 250 Ghost Kills.

trophies.name: Silent but Deadly
trophies.description: Kill 50 enemies during a Sound Mask.

trophies.name: Knives for a Pro
trophies.description: Perform 100 lethal Takedowns.

trophies.name: Always Greener
trophies.description: While in Tall Grass, kill 50 Soldiers.

trophies.name: Pen Pal
trophies.description: Collect 35 Personal Letters.

trophies.name: Top Secret
trophies.description: Collect 35 Classified Documents.

trophies.name: Treasure Hunter
trophies.description: Collect 22 Hidden Items.

trophies.name: Spread Your Wings
trophies.description: Destroy 21 Dead-eye Targets.

trophies.name: Innovator
trophies.description: Interact with 21 Workbenches.

trophies.name: Survivalist
trophies.description: Complete an entire Survival mission.

trophies.name: File O' Facts
trophies.description: Recover evidence implicating Resistance members within the Library in Dead Drop.

trophies.name: Sprung a Leak
trophies.description: Sabotage the Dam's pump room in Collision Course.

trophies.name: Stopping Traffic
trophies.description: Destroy the Trucks carrying Kleine Blume ingredients in Devil's Cauldron.

trophies.name: Lost its way Gnome
trophies.description: Find the French Resistance Gnome and take a Picture.

trophies.name: Tanks for Nothing!
trophies.description: Destroy the Panzer Tank in End of the Line.

trophies.name: Mastermind
trophies.description: Headshot Kruger.

trophies.name: Propagandist
trophies.description: Complete all Propaganda missions with a 3 Star Rating.

trophies.name: Propaganda Machine
trophies.description: Complete all Propaganda missions with a 3 Star Rating on Authentic difficulty.

trophies.name: Take 5, and... ACHTUNG!
trophies.description: Lights, Camera, ACHTUNG! - Kill Hitler 5 times.

trophies.description: Lights, Camera, ACHTUNG! - Kill only Hitler and exfiltrate.

trophies.name: He did Nazi-it Coming
trophies.description: Lights, Camera, ACHTUNG! - Kill Hitler at a distance of 250 meters or more.

trophies.name: In The Dead Of Reich
trophies.description: Lights, Camera, ACHTUNG! - Kill Hitler and exfiltrate without ever being detected.

trophies.name: Blockbuster
trophies.description: Lights, Camera, ACHTUNG! - Complete the mission on Authentic difficulty.

trophies.name: That's a Wrap!
trophies.description: Lights, Camera, ACHTUNG! - Complete the mission.

trophies.name: B-Movie
trophies.description: Lights, Camera, ACHTUNG! - Complete the mission with a 2 star rating.

trophies.name: Mein Juewel!
trophies.description: Lights, Camera, ACHTUNG! - Kill Hitler with a testicle shot.

trophies.name: Mortar Combat
trophies.description: Vercors Vendetta - Complete the mission.

trophies.name: Nein-a Blume
trophies.description: Vercors Vendetta - Complete the mission with a 2 star rating.

trophies.name: Vercors' Vengeance
trophies.description: Vercors Vendetta - Complete the mission on Authentic difficulty.

trophies.name: Vergeltungswaffe
trophies.description: Striking Range - Complete the mission.

trophies.name: Communication Breakdown
trophies.description: Striking Range - Complete the mission with a 2 star rating.

trophies.name: Jailbreak
trophies.description: Striking Range - Complete the mission on Authentic difficulty.

trophies.name: Mis-guided-missile
trophies.description: Mud and Thunder - Complete the mission.

trophies.name: Lethal Love letter
trophies.description: Mud and Thunder - Complete the mission with a 2 star rating.

trophies.name: The Path of Most Resistance
trophies.description: Mud and Thunder - Complete the mission on Authentic difficulty.

trophies.name: Hot Topic
trophies.description: Construct a furnace out of eight cobblestone blocks.

trophies.name: Acquire Hardware
trophies.description: Smelt an iron ingot.

trophies.name: Time to Farm!
trophies.description: Use planks and sticks to make a hoe.

trophies.name: Bake Bread
trophies.description: Turn wheat into bread.

trophies.name: The Lie
trophies.description: Bake a cake using wheat, sugar, milk and eggs!

trophies.name: Getting an Upgrade
trophies.description: Construct a better pickaxe.

trophies.name: Delicious Fish
trophies.description: Catch and cook a fish!

trophies.name: On A Rail
trophies.description: Travel by minecart to a point at least 500m in a single direction from where you started.

trophies.name: Time to Strike!
trophies.description: Use planks and sticks to make a sword.

trophies.name: Monster Hunter
trophies.description: Attack and destroy a monster.

trophies.name: Cow Tipper
trophies.description: Harvest some leather.

trophies.name: When Pigs Fly
trophies.description: Use a saddle to ride a pig, then have the pig get hurt from fall damage while riding it.

trophies.name: Leader Of The Pack
trophies.description: Befriend five wolves.

trophies.name: MOAR Tools
trophies.description: Construct one type of each tool (one pickaxe, one spade, one axe and one hoe).

trophies.name: Dispense With This
trophies.description: Construct a Dispenser.

trophies.name: Into The Nether
trophies.description: Construct a Nether Portal.

trophies.name: Sniper Duel
trophies.description: Kill a skeleton with an arrow from more than 50 meters.

trophies.name: DIAMONDS!
trophies.description: Acquire diamonds with your iron tools.

trophies.name: Return to Sender
trophies.description: Destroy a Ghast with a fireball.

trophies.name: Into Fire
trophies.description: Relieve a Blaze of its rod.

trophies.name: Local Brewery
trophies.description: Brew a potion.

trophies.name: The End?
trophies.description: Enter an End Portal.

trophies.name: The End.
trophies.description: Kill the Enderdragon.

trophies.name: Enchanter
trophies.description: Construct an Enchantment Table.

trophies.name: Overkill
trophies.description: Deal nine hearts of damage in a single hit.

trophies.name: Librarian
trophies.description: Build some bookshelves to improve your enchantment table.

trophies.name: Adventuring Time
trophies.description: Discover 17 of 40 biomes.

trophies.name: Repopulation
trophies.description: Breed two cows with wheat.

trophies.name: Diamonds to you!
trophies.description: Throw diamonds at another player.

trophies.name: Pork Chop
trophies.description: Cook and eat a pork chop.

trophies.name: Passing the Time
trophies.description: Play for 100 days.

trophies.name: Archer
trophies.description: Kill a creeper with arrows.

trophies.name: The Haggler
trophies.description: Acquire 30 Emeralds by trading with villagers or mining.

trophies.name: Pot Planter
trophies.description: Craft and place a Flower Pot.

trophies.name: It’s a Sign!
trophies.description: Craft and place a sign.

trophies.name: Iron Belly
trophies.description: Stop starvation using Rotten Flesh.

trophies.name: Have a Shearful Day
trophies.description: Use Shears to obtain wool from a sheep.

trophies.name: Rainbow Collection
trophies.description: Gather all 16 colours of wool.

trophies.name: Stayin’ Frosty
trophies.description: Swim in lava while having the Fire Resistance effect.

trophies.name: Chestful of Cobblestone
trophies.description: Mine 1,728 Cobblestone and place it in a chest.

trophies.name: Renewable Energy
trophies.description: Smelt wood trunks using charcoal to make more charcoal.

trophies.name: Music to my Ears
trophies.description: Play a music disc in a Jukebox.

trophies.name: Body Guard
trophies.description: Create an Iron Golem.

trophies.name: Iron Man
trophies.description: Wear a full suit of Iron armour.

trophies.name: Zombie Doctor
trophies.description: Cure a zombie villager.

trophies.name: Lion Hunter
trophies.description: Gain the trust of an Ocelot.

trophies.name: The Beginning?
trophies.description: Spawn the Wither.

trophies.name: The Beginning.
trophies.description: Kill the Wither.

trophies.name: Beaconator
trophies.description: Create and fully power a Beacon.

trophies.name: Overpowered
trophies.description: Eat a Notch Apple.

trophies.name: Tie Dye Outfit
trophies.description: Dye all 4 unique pieces of Leather Armor.

trophies.name: Trampoline
trophies.description: Bounce 30 blocks upward off a Slime Block.

trophies.name: The End... Again...
trophies.description: Respawn the Enderdragon.

trophies.name: You Need a Mint
trophies.description: Collect Dragon's Breath in a Glass Bottle.

trophies.name: Super Sonic
trophies.description: Use an Elytra to fly through a 1 by 1 gap while moving faster than 40 m/s.

trophies.name: Dry Spell
trophies.description: Dry a Sponge in a Furnace.

trophies.name: Free Diver
trophies.description: Stay underwater for 2 minutes.

trophies.name: Super Fuel
trophies.description: Power a Furnace with Lava.

trophies.name: Saddle Up
trophies.description: Tame a Horse.

trophies.name: Taste of Your Own Medicine
trophies.description: Poison a Witch with a Splash Potion.

trophies.name: Beam Me Up
trophies.description: Teleport over 100 meters from a single throw of an Ender Pearl.

trophies.name: Map Room
trophies.description: Place 9 fully explored, adjacent Maps into 9 Item Frames in a 3 by 3 square.

trophies.name: Camouflage
trophies.description: Kill a Mob while wearing the same type of Mob Head.

trophies.name: The Deep End
trophies.description: Defeat an Elder Guardian.

trophies.name: Great View From Up Here
trophies.description: Levitate up 50 block from the attacks of a Shulker.

trophies.name: Change of Sheets
trophies.description: Dye your bed a different color.

trophies.name: Cheating Death
trophies.description: Use the Totem of Undying to cheat death.

trophies.name: So I got that going for me...
trophies.description: Lead a caravan containing at least 5 Llamas.

trophies.name: Let it go!
trophies.description: Using the Frost Walker boots, walk on at least 1 block on frozen water on a deep ocean.

trophies.name: Feeling ill
trophies.description: Defeat an Evoker.

trophies.name: One Pickle, Two Pickle, Sea Pickle, Four
trophies.description: Place four Sea Pickles in one block.

trophies.name: Alternative Fuel
trophies.description: Use a Dried Kelp block as fuel in a furnace.

trophies.name: Moskstraumen
trophies.description: Activate a Conduit.

trophies.name: Castaway
trophies.description: Eat nothing but Kelp for 3 days.

trophies.name: Sleep with the Fishes
trophies.description: Stay underwater for one full day without using potions.

trophies.name: Echolocation
trophies.description: Feed a dolphin raw cod and have it lure you to treasure.

trophies.name: Do a Barrel Roll
trophies.description: Use Riptide to give yourself a boost.

trophies.name: Marine Biologist
trophies.description: Collect any fish in a bucket.

trophies.name: Ahoy!
trophies.description: Discover a Shipwreck.

trophies.name: Top of the World
trophies.description: Build a tower of Scaffolding that reaches the maximum build height.

trophies.name: Where Have You Been?
trophies.description: Receive a gift in the morning from a tamed Cat.

trophies.name: Zoologist
trophies.description: Breed two Pandas with Bamboo.

trophies.name: Atlantis?
trophies.description: Find an underwater ruin.

trophies.name: Organizational Wizard
trophies.description: Name a Shulker Box with an Anvil.

trophies.name: Fruit on the Loom
trophies.description: Craft a Banner using an Enchanted Apple.

trophies.name: Plethora of Cats
trophies.description: Befriend twenty stray Cats.

trophies.name: Sail the 7 Seas
trophies.description: Visit all Ocean Biomes.

trophies.name: Buy Low, Sell High
trophies.description: Trade for the best possible price.

trophies.name: Disenchanted
trophies.description: Use a Grindstone to get experience from an enchanted item.

trophies.name: I've got a bad feeling about this
trophies.description: Kill a Pillager Captain.

trophies.name: Kill the Beast!
trophies.description: Defeat a Ravager.

trophies.name: Sound the Alarm!
trophies.description: Ring the bell with a hostile enemy in the village.

trophies.name: We're being attacked!
trophies.description: Trigger a Pillager Raid.

trophies.name: Freight Station
trophies.description: Use a hopper to move an item from a chest minecart to a chest. [Bedrock Only]

trophies.name: Smelt Everything!
trophies.description: Connect three chests to a single furnace using three hoppers. [Bedrock Only]

trophies.name: Inception
trophies.description: Push a piston with a piston, then pull the original piston with that piston. [Bedrock Only]

trophies.name: Artificial Selection
trophies.description: Breed a mule from a horse and a donkey. [Bedrock Only]

trophies.name: Rabbit Season
trophies.description: Cook and eat rabbit meat. [Bedrock Only]

trophies.name: Treasure Hunter
trophies.description: Buy an Ocean Explorer or Woodland Explorer map from a villager, then enter the revealed structure. [Bedrock Only]

trophies.name: Me Gold!
trophies.description: Dig up a buried treasure. [Bedrock Only]

trophies.name: Master Trader
trophies.description: Trade for 1,000 Emeralds. [Bedrock Only]

trophies.name: Time for Stew
trophies.description: Give someone a suspicious stew. [Bedrock Only]

trophies.name: Bee Our Guest
trophies.description: Use a Campfire to collect Honey from a Beehive using a Bottle without aggravating the bees. [Bedrock Only]

trophies.name: Total Beelocation
trophies.description: Move and place a Bee Nest, with 3 bees inside, using Silk Touch. [Bedrock Only]

trophies.name: Sticky Situation
trophies.description: Slide down a honey block to slow your fall. [Bedrock Only]

trophies.name: Bullseye
trophies.description: Hit the bullseye of a Target block [Bedrock Only]

trophies.name: Cover me in debris
trophies.description: Wear a full set of Netherite armor [Bedrock Only]

trophies.name: Oooh, shiny!
trophies.description: Distract a Piglin using gold [Bedrock Only]

trophies.name: Hot tourist destination
trophies.description: Visit all Nether biomes [Bedrock Only]

trophies.name: Whatever floats your Goat
trophies.description: Get in a boat and float with a goat

trophies.name: Wax on, Wax off
trophies.description: Apply and remove Wax from all the Copper blocks!!!

trophies.name: The Healing Power of Friendship!
trophies.description: Team up with an axolotl and win a fight

trophies.name: Caves and Cliffs
trophies.description: Free fall from the top of the world (build limit) to the bottom of the world and survive

trophies.name: Star trader
trophies.description: Trade with a villager at the build height limit

trophies.name: Sound of Music
trophies.description: Make the Meadows come alive with the sound of music from a jukebox

trophies.name: Feels Like Home
trophies.description: Take your Strider for a ride on a lava lake in the Overworld for a distance of 50 meters from the point where the ride starts

trophies.name: It Spreads
trophies.description: Kill a mob next to a catalyst

trophies.name: Birthday Song
trophies.description: Have an Allay drop a cake at a note block

trophies.name: With Our Powers Combined!
trophies.description: Have all 3 froglights in your inventory

trophies.name: Sneak 100
trophies.description: Sneak next to a Sculk Sensor without triggering it

trophies.name: Planting the past
trophies.description: Grow sniffer seeds (plant any sniffer seed)

trophies.name: Careful restoration
trophies.description: Make a decorated pot out of 4 pottery shards

trophies.name: Smithing with style
trophies.description: Trim with all the following smithing templates at least once: Spire, Snout, Rib, Ward, Silence, Vex, Tide and Wayfinder.

trophies.name: Revaulting
trophies.description: Unlock a Vault with an Ominous Trial Key

trophies.name: Crafters Crafting Crafters
trophies.description: Be near a Crafter when it crafts a Crafter

trophies.name: Who Needs Rockets?
trophies.description: Use a Wind Charge to launch yourself upward 8 blocks

trophies.name: Over-Overkill
trophies.description: Deal 50 hearts of damage in a single hit using the Mace

trophies.name: Heart Transplanter
trophies.description: Place a Creaking Heart with the correct alignment between two Pale Oak Log blocks

trophies.name: Stay Hydrated!
trophies.description: Place a Dried Ghast block into water

trophies.name: Mob Kabob
trophies.description: Hit five mobs in the same Charge attack using the Spear

trophies.name: Trashiest Goblin
trophies.description: Collect all trophies.

trophies.name: Suds Law
trophies.description: Use a sponge to clean a trinket.

trophies.name: Chip Off The Old Block
trophies.description: Use a chisel to uncover a trinket.

trophies.name: One Goblin's Junk
trophies.description: Use the upcycler to create a unique trinket.

trophies.name: Trash To Treasure
trophies.description: Sell a trinket to a customer.

trophies.name: Cleanliness Is Next To Goblin-ness
trophies.description: Clean 100 trinkets.

trophies.name: Feeling Chipper
trophies.description: Uncover 100 trinkets.

trophies.name: Beauty Is In The Eye Of The Upcycler
trophies.description: Upcycle 100 trinkets.

trophies.name: Rags To Riches
trophies.description: Sell 100 trinkets.

trophies.name: Tools Of The Trade
trophies.description: Upgrade one of your tools.

trophies.name: Aimon Expert Now
trophies.description: Complete the tutorial.

trophies.name: Scratch That Lich
trophies.description: Save Aimon's soul from the armoire lich.

trophies.name: Delving Deep
trophies.description: Upgrade your Aunty's Delver Licence.

trophies.name: Fun Guys
trophies.description: Ask the Hullifers to retrieve a trinket via the Fetching Fungi Beta Program.

trophies.name: Silver City Sightseeing
trophies.description: Take Aimon's cart and visit a new district.

trophies.name: Feeling Expansive
trophies.description: Purchase an item from expansion mode.

trophies.name: Feels Like Home
trophies.description: Decorate your home with an option from customisation mode.

trophies.name: Sale Away
trophies.description: Sell a trinket for at least 500 Gold.

trophies.name: Pay Day
trophies.description: Sell a trinket for at least 1000 Gold.

trophies.name: Long Weekend
trophies.description: Close the shop for 3 days.

trophies.name: Chip Monk
trophies.description: Spend a whole day doing nothing but Chipping.

trophies.name: Squeaky Clean
trophies.description: Spend a whole day doing nothing but Cleaning.

trophies.name: Up Down Left and Right-cycling
trophies.description: Spend a whole day doing nothing but Upcycling.

trophies.name: Wholly Spirit
trophies.description: Help the Spirit of Lost Things build a new body and see the results.

trophies.name: Best. Lizard. Ever.
trophies.description: Help bring about Success for Donoval.

trophies.name: Sign Of The Times
trophies.description: Customise the shop sign.

trophies.name: Gotta Hand It To You
trophies.description: Help Esme with her pest problem.

trophies.name: Glam-phibeans
trophies.description: Max out the Reputation for Frogs.

trophies.name: Hue-manity
trophies.description: Max out the Reputation for Humans.

trophies.name: Rep-Tiles
trophies.description: Max out the Reputation for Lizards.

trophies.name: Acce-Spore-Ise
trophies.description: Max out the Reputation for Mushrooms.

trophies.name: Festoo-OOoon
trophies.description: Max out the Reputation for Spirits.

trophies.name: Haute Culture
trophies.description: Max out the Reputation of all five species.

trophies.name: Deals For Days

trophies.description: Sell items at market price for 8 sales in a row.

trophies.name: Welcome Back
trophies.description: Welcome Aimon back from their extended break.

trophies.name: Market Forces
trophies.description: Make 5000 Gold in a day.

trophies.name: I'll Ring Your Bell
trophies.description: Ring the customer bell 24 times.

trophies.name: Set Up Shop
trophies.description: Purchase the Customer Bench, Display Mat, Soak Tub, and the Pay-What-You-Can Box.

trophies.name: Esteemed Clientele

trophies.name: Seen It All
